scenarios.description: clone() returns a distinct Document with equal baseUri, location, outputSettings and parser when no modifications are present
scenarios.precondition: Document original = new Document("http://example.com"); // empty document, default settings
scenarios.expectedResult: clone != original; clone.baseUri() equals original.baseUri(); clone.location() equals original.location(); clone.outputSettings() is equal but not same instance as original.outputSettings(); clone.parser() is equal but not same instance as original.parser(); original childNodes and clone childNodes lists are equal size and elements equal but not same instances

scenarios.description: clone() deep-copies outputSettings and parser; modifying original after clone does not affect the clone
scenarios.expectedResult: after clone, changing original.outputSettings().indentAmount to a different value and original.parser().setTrackErrors(-1) does not change clone.outputSettings().indentAmount and clone.parser() configuration remains unchanged

scenarios.description: clone() deep-copies element children; adding an element to original after clone does not affect clone children
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.childNodes size equals original childNodes at clone time plus shell nodes; after original.appendElement("p"), clone.childNodes size remains unchanged
